items.title: July 17, 1986: A pair of fast break dunks from USA's Kenny Smith (assisted by David Robinson and Muggsy Bogues) during the first half of a 96-80 win over Brazil in the semifinal round of the men's World Basketball Championship.
items.author: NBA Cobwebs
items.body_excerpt:
July 17, 1986: A pair of fast break dunks from USA's Kenny Smith (assisted by David Robinson and Muggsy Bogues) during the first half of a 96-80 win over Brazil in the semifinal round of the men's World Basketball Championship.

Smith scored 15 PTS and Robinson had 17 PTS/7 REB.

items.title: The NBPA has a new executive director and is using its voice again publicly. It is ready to push back against the NBA when needed, and unwinding the economic system installed in the 2023 CBA is a priority.
items.author: Mike Vorkunov
items.body_excerpt:
The NBPA has a new executive director and is using its voice again publicly. It is ready to push back against the NBA when needed, and unwinding the economic system installed in the 2023 CBA is a priority.

"We have to be prepared to fight."

Free for all to read: www.nytimes.com/athletic/743...
